GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [item_id@0 ASC, ss_item_rev@1 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[item_id@0 ASC, ss_item_rev@1 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[item_id@1 as item_id, ss_item_rev@2 as ss_item_rev, ss_item_rev@2 / __common_expr_7@0 * Some(100),20,0 as ss_dev, cs_item_rev@3 as cs_item_rev, cs_item_rev@3 / __common_expr_7@0 * Some(100),20,0 as cs_dev, ws_item_rev@4 as ws_item_rev, ws_item_rev@4 / __common_expr_7@0 * Some(100),20,0 as ws_dev, __common_expr_7@0 as average]

          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(item_id@0, item_id@0)], filter=CAST(ss_item_rev@0 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) >= CAST(0.9 * CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)) AND CAST(ss_item_rev@0 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) <= CAST(1.1 * CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)) AND CAST(cs_item_rev@1 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) >= CAST(0.9 * CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)) AND CAST(cs_item_rev@1 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) <= CAST(1.1 * CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)) AND CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) >= CAST(0.9 * CAST(ss_item_rev@0 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)) AND CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) <= CAST(1.1 * CAST(ss_item_rev@0 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)) AND CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) >= CAST(0.9 * CAST(cs_item_rev@1 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)) AND CAST(ws_item_rev@2 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) <= CAST(1.1 * CAST(cs_item_rev@1 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)), projection=[0, 1, 2, 4]

                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                                                  GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                                                    GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                                                  GpuScanExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
